recommendation.name: Google Workspace
recommendation.reason: Professional email (@yourdomain) + Google Calendar + Drive. Yahoo has no API for automation.

alternatives.name: Keep Yahoo + forward
alternatives.reason: Lowest friction — forward to new inbox, keep old address active

recommendation.name: Google Calendar
recommendation.reason: Better API integrations — connects to CRM, showing tools, and AI assistants. Cozi is family-oriented but lacks automation hooks.

alternatives.name: Calendly
alternatives.reason: Client self-scheduling, auto-timezone for PCS families

recommendation.name: ShowingTime (keep)
recommendation.reason: Industry standard, MLS-integrated. Keep as-is — it works.

recommendation.name: Form Simplicity (keep)
recommendation.reason: Works fine for forms and e-signatures. Consider Dotloop later if you want built-in CRM.

alternatives.name: Dotloop
alternatives.reason: Transaction management + CRM combo, better collaboration

alternatives.name: SkySlope
alternatives.reason: Full brokerage compliance — overkill for solo

recommendation.name: ManyChat
recommendation.reason: Automates lead responses across Instagram, Facebook, and SMS — the 3 channels that matter most.

alternatives.name: Hootsuite
alternatives.reason: Full social management but no lead automation

recommendation.name: Keep current website
recommendation.reason: Your website already generates leads — we add AI to capture and respond to them.

recommendation.name: Follow Up Boss
recommendation.reason: Built for real estate — lead routing, automated follow-ups, showing coordination. Best ROI for solo agents.

alternatives.name: kvCORE
alternatives.reason: Full brokerage platform, IDX website included — overkill for solo

alternatives.name: Real Geeks
alternatives.reason: Good CRM + website combo, but steeper learning curve
